fields.acceptance_criteria: Visual state badge showing current state; dropdown or button row showing valid next transitions from schema; click advances state via PATCH; undo button reverts last transition; required_states warning before close; confirmation dialog for terminal states
fields.title: Feature: State transition UI — visual state machine with advance/undo

fields.acceptance_criteria: Visual state badge showing current state; dropdown or button row showing valid next transitions from schema; click advances state via PATCH /api/tickets/{id}; undo button reverts last transition; required_states constraint displayed visually (e.g. grayed-out close button with tooltip when required states not yet visited); error display when server rejects transition; schema-driven (reads allowed transitions from schema endpoint); optimistic update with gate per interview decision
fields.title: Feature: State transition UI — visual state machine with advance/undo
